items.title: Guest Trust Clarity Release
items.description: Release focused on improving guest booking confidence through clearer total price explanation, review trust presentation, and cancellation guidance on listing and checkout surfaces.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase conversion by reducing trust and pricing uncertainty before booking.
Increase clarity about fees and cancellation terms.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase repeat booking behavior by improving first-booking trust.

productBricks.change: Improve review, host trust, and policy presentation.
Clarify total price, fee explanation, and cancellation logic.

deliveryChannels.change: Roll out updated listing and checkout treatments on web.
Release supporting trust and pricing service changes.

items.title: New Host Fast Activation Release
items.description: Release focused on reducing host setup friction by simplifying listing authoring, availability defaults, and first-booking pricing guidance.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce days to first booking by getting hosts live faster with better pricing defaults.
Increase the share of setup starts that become live listings.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase active supply quality by improving setup completeness and accuracy.

productBricks.change: Simplify host activation and readiness checks.
Improve listing setup guidance and content quality prompts.
Improve first-booking pricing and discount recommendations.

deliveryChannels.change: Launch improved host web onboarding and listing-editing flow.
Release host mobile setup improvements on iOS.

items.title: Operator Control and Recovery Release
items.description: Release focused on multi-listing operators by improving co-host permissions, turnover coordination, and case visibility for reservation exceptions and payouts.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase portfolio readiness and check-in reliability.
Reduce the time needed to close standard operator issue cases.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve retention and growth of operator-managed supply.

productBricks.change: Add clearer role-based permissions and delegation paths.
Improve turnover and readiness workflow visibility.
Improve operator-facing issue and case tracking.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated portfolio operations web console.
Release supporting permission and operator integration updates.
